differentials.name: erosive arthritis √  soft-tissue swelling ± periarticular osteoporosis
differentials.raw: erosive arthritis √  soft-tissue swelling ± periarticular osteoporosis

context: central / marginal erosions (50%): | resorption of palmar aspect of terminal phalanges (most frequent sign) | bony erosions of carpal bones (trapezium), distal radius + ulna, mandible, ribs, | joint-space narrowing (late)
